title: dichasianthus contortuplicatus
intro: Dichasianthus contortuplicatus, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dichasianthus contortuplicatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or infusions, can be made by boiling the leaves and stems in water, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
